modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unwanted popups and security alerts on Windows workstation

full_description_text:  
So, I was just browsing the web on my Windows workstation, right? Suddenly, I get this crazy message saying my computer detected viruses, which is super alarming. Then, out of nowhere, I hear this voice telling me to call Microsoft, which is just bizarre! To make matters worse, I tried to close this pop-up ad, but it just wouldn’t budge, and I ended up getting a security alert that said my computer was locked up. It’s like I was trapped in this endless loop of popups and alerts, and I really need to figure out what’s going on here!
